Apolo Ohno is an 8-time Olympic short track speed skating medalist who retired from competition in 2010 and has spoken extensively about the post-Olympic identity transition (cf. his 2018 book Hard Pivot, which covers this exact arc). SIO excerpt paraphrases Ohno's documented post-Olympic-transition argument, not a verbatim quote. No chapter markers in the video description.
